title: Galna Fort
tagline: Galna Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Galna was a major fort in Malegaon talukain in the south Khandesh area of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Galna was a major fort in Malegaon talukain in the south Khandesh area of Maharashtra, India. This fort was an important fort on the Burhanpur-Surat trade route. This is one of the forts in Maharashtra with the bastion and the entrance in good condition. This fort is located on hills between Malegaon and Dhule.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Galna Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Galna Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Galna Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jalgaon Airport (115 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (117 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Galna Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Galna Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Galna Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Galna Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
